data.title: Canary Litecoin Spot ETF has been listed on the DTCC official website with the code LTCC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the DTCC official website, the Canary Litecoin spot ETF has been listed on the DTCC official website with the code LTCC and the creation/redemption column showing D. Although this does not mean that the ETF has obtained any regulatory approval or any clear approval process results, it is listed on the DTCC website as a "standard process" for launching a new ETF.

data.title: Kraken and Crypto.com plan to launch their own stablecoins to meet new European regulations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Affected by new European regulations, crypto service providers need to remove unlicensed stablecoins. Kraken is developing a dollar-pegged stablecoin and plans to issue it by its Irish subsidiary. At the same time, Crypto.com plans to launch its own stablecoin in the third quarter of 2025 and expand to the European market. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Argentina's Senate asks government to submit report on LIBRA scandal
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Argentine Senate passed a motion with 46 votes in favor and 15 votes against, requiring the government to provide a report on the LIBRA scandal. At the same time, the Senate rejected the proposal to set up an investigation committee. Although 47 senators supported it, it did not reach the 48 vote threshold to start, and ultimately failed to pass.
At the same time, the proposal to set up a parliamentary committee to investigate the scandal was rejected. The proposal was supported by 47 senators, but 48 votes were required to start the procedure. (TASS)

data.title: SBF changes political stance in recent interview and seeks pardon from Trump
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Like many people in and outside the crypto industry who hope to gain political points in Trump's second term, FTX founder SBF unabashedly "sided" with Trump in an interview with the New York Sun on February 18: "I've spent a lot of time studying crypto policy and am very frustrated and disappointed with what I've seen and heard from the Biden administration and the Democratic Party. The Biden administration is extremely destructive and difficult to work with. Frankly speaking, the Republicans are much more reasonable." SBF hinted that his rightward tendency began in 2022 because he and Trump have a common enemy, Lewis Kaplan, the judge in charge of the FTX fraud case and Trump's federal defamation trial. In 2020, SBF was the second largest donor to Biden's campaign, but SBF now says: "I thought I was center-left at the time, but now I don't think of myself that way anymore. The atmosphere in the technology industry has changed, and once outspoken Democrats such as Mark Zuckerberg and Marc Andreessen now support Trump." (The Block)

data.title: Canary Litecoin Spot ETF Listed On DTCC Website
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Canary Litecoin Spot ETF has been listed on the DTCC website as of February 21. The ETF is identified by the code LTCC, with the creation/redemption section marked as D. While this listing does not imply any regulatory approval or definitive outcome of an approval process, it is considered a standard procedure for launching a new ETF.

data.title: Grayscale Reports Significant Outflows In Bitcoin And Ethereum Trusts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from Farside Investors indicates that Grayscale experienced substantial net outflows in its cryptocurrency trusts on February 21. The Grayscale Bitcoin Trust (GBTC) saw a net outflow of $33.5 million, while the Grayscale Mini Bitcoin Trust recorded a net outflow of $61.1 million. Additionally, the Grayscale Ethereum Trust (ETHE) reported a net outflow of $10.3 million, with the Mini Ethereum Trust showing no net inflow or outflow.

data.title: Trump’s newly confirmed FBI Director Kash Patel holds $115,000 in Bitcoin
data.description:
Kash Patel is now officially the director of the FBI. The Senate confirmed him Thursday in a 51-49 vote, delivering a major win for Donald Trump, who has spent years clashing with the agency. Every Senate Democrat voted against Kash. Susan Collins of Maine and Lisa Murkowski of Alaska, both Republicans, also opposed his nomination. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trumps-newly-confirmed-fbi-director-kash-patel-holds-115000-in-bitcoin/

data.title: Hackers Drain Bank Accounts in New Global Attack on Apple and Google Android Devices: Samsung Alert
data.description:
Hackers are draining bank accounts and stealing smartphone users’ credentials using a new and highly effective technique, according to Samsung. The tech giant says cybercriminals are now sending text messages that appear to be from banks and delivery services – with PDF files attached. The PDFs either contain links that exploit security flaws and install […]

data.title: Russian authorities unblock website of crypto exchange data aggregator BestChange
data.description:
The Russia-based crypto website BestChange is accessible once again. The website aggregates exchange information and may have been blocked for violating a law on advertising passed last year. The BestChange website was blocked on Feb. 10 without warning and added to the list of banned websites maintained by Roskomnadzor, the federal communications authority. It was […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russian-authorities-unblock-website-of-crypto-exchange-data-aggregator-bestchange/
